name: Heretic
description: Heretic is a dark fantasy first-person shooter video game released in December 1994.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Goal
options.description: Choose the main goal.

options.label: Difficulty
options.description: Choose the game difficulty.

options.label: Random Monsters
options.description: Choose how monsters are randomized.

options.label: Random Pickups
options.description: Choose how pickups are randomized.

options.label: Random Music
options.description: Level musics will be randomized.

options.label: Allow Death Logic
options.description: Some locations require a timed puzzle that can only be tried once.

options.label: Pro
options.description: Include difficult tricks into rules.

options.label: Check Sanity
options.description: Include redundant checks.

options.label: Start With Map Scrolls
options.description: Give the player all Map Scroll items from the start.

options.label: Reset Level On Death
options.description: When dying, levels are reset and monsters respawned.

options.label: Death Link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies.

options.label: Episode1
options.description: City of the Damned.

options.label: Episode2
options.description: Hell's Maw.

options.label: Episode3
options.description: The Dome of D'Sparil.

options.label: Episode4
options.description: The Ossuary.

options.label: Episode5
options.description: The Stagnant Demesne.

options.label: Split Bag Of Holding
options.description: Split the Bag of Holding into six individual items, each one increasing ammo capacity for one type of weapon only.

options.label: Bag Of Holding Count
options.description: How many Bags of Holding will be available.

options.label: Max Ammo Crystals
options.description: Set the starting ammo capacity for crystals (Elven Wand ammo).

options.label: Max Ammo Arrows
options.description: Set the starting ammo capacity for arrows (Ethereal Crossbow ammo).

options.label: Max Ammo Claw Orbs
options.description: Set the starting ammo capacity for claw orbs (Dragon Claw ammo).

options.label: Max Ammo Runes
options.description: Set the starting ammo capacity for runes (Hellstaff ammo).

options.label: Max Ammo Flame Orbs
options.description: Set the starting ammo capacity for flame orbs (Phoenix Rod ammo).

options.label: Max Ammo Spheres
options.description: Set the starting ammo capacity for spheres (Firemace ammo).

options.label: Added Ammo Crystals
options.description: Set the amount of crystal capacity gained when collecting a bag of holding or a capacity upgrade.

options.label: Added Ammo Arrows
options.description: Set the amount of arrow capacity gained when collecting a bag of holding or a capacity upgrade.

options.label: Added Ammo Claw Orbs
options.description: Set the amount of claw orb capacity gained when collecting a bag of holding or a capacity upgrade.

options.label: Added Ammo Runes
options.description: Set the amount of rune capacity gained when collecting a bag of holding or a capacity upgrade.

options.label: Added Ammo Flame Orbs
options.description: Set the amount of flame orb capacity gained when collecting a bag of holding or a capacity upgrade.

options.label: Added Ammo Spheres
options.description: Set the amount of sphere capacity gained when collecting a bag of holding or a capacity upgrade.
